texto: You can't have a heart attack and leave me an orphan. You know I'd just blow all our money on drugs and rock'n'roll.""All the best heroes are orphans," Dad said. "You'd be in good company, if you went on a quest or something." He looked at the other girls. "You're not orphans, are you?""Not me," they both answered."You'll never amount to anything....
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Robison Wells que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “You can't have a heart attack and leave me an orphan. You know I'd just blow all our money on dru…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, humor, orphans-in-literature, com foco em orphans-in-literature e sarcasm.
